title: crotalaria riparia
intro: Crotalaria riparia, also known as the riparian rattlebox or yellow rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family (Fabaceae). It is native to tropical Africa and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria riparia include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a treatment for various gastrointestinal issues. Crotalaria riparia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional remedies as a powder or extract.
